heading: Disk IOPS Burst Credits for Atlas Clusters on Azure (Microsoft Azure)
body:
Atlas clusters deployed to Azure (Microsoft Azure) may use credit-based
bursting, but the disk will burst only if it has burst credits
accumulated in its credit bucket. Azure (Microsoft Azure) also offers an on-demand
bursting model, where the disk bursts whenever its needs exceed its
current capacity.

See the Azure (Microsoft Azure) [Disk Bursting documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/disk-bursting) for more information about how bursting
for Azure (Microsoft Azure) disks works.
